mapper.select:
SELECT -- 오늘 체크인 예정 건수 (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reservation rv JOIN room r ON rv.room_id = r.room_id JOIN place pl ON pl.place_id = r.place_id WHERE pl.partner_id = #{partnerId} AND TO_CHAR(rv.check_in_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND rv.status != 'CANCELED') AS "checkInTotal",
-- 오늘 체크아웃 예정 건수 (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reservation rv JOIN room r ON rv.room_id = r.room_id JOIN place pl ON pl.place_id = r.place_id WHERE pl.partner_id = #{partnerId} AND TO_CHAR(rv.check_out_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND rv.status != 'CANCELED') AS "checkOutTotal",
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders o JOIN order_detail od ON o.order_id = od.order_id JOIN reservation rv ON rv.reservation_id = od.reservation_id JOIN room r ON rv.room_id = r.room_id JOIN place pl ON pl.place_id = r.place_id WHERE pl.partner_id = #{partnerId} AND TO_CHAR(o.order_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND o.status != 'CANCELED') AS "newReserveTotal" FROM DUAL

SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM place_review pr JOIN place pl ON pl.place_id = pr.place_id WHERE pl.partner_id = #{partnerId} AND TO_CHAR(pr.created_at, 'YYYY-MM') = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM')) AS "unreadReviewCount",
-- 이번 달 총 매출액 (결제 완료된 건만) (SELECT NVL(SUM(o.real_total_amount), 0) FROM orders o JOIN order_detail od ON o.order_id = od.order_id JOIN reservation rv ON rv.reservation_id = od.reservation_id JOIN room r ON r.room_id = rv.room_id JOIN place pl ON pl.place_id = r.place_id WHERE pl.partner_id = #{partnerId} AND TO_CHAR(rv.check_out_date, 'YYYY-MM') = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM') AND o.status != 'CANCELED') AS "thisMonthSales" FROM DUAL
